title: MobilePererecos
description: A modpack for the MinePererecos server (mobile version for PojavLauncher)
body:
# MobilePererecos serverpack

## NOTICE!
This modpack is still in the early stages of development. If you encounter any bugs while using it, please contact the modpack owners over on [Discord](https://discord.gg/qPpYV8RBFm).

## About
This is a modpack made specially for the MinePererecos survival server, with mobile players who use the [PojavLauncher](https://pojavlauncherteam.github.io/) project in mind. It contains optimizations, visual and QoL upgrades over the vanilla Minecraft experience, and modifications on the interface for better use in phone screens.

You are free to use this modpack as you wish, but the main focus is to provide a better experience for players of the server, so this modpack may not be well-suited for singleplayer play.

## Attribution

The MobilePererecos modpack includes the following resourcepacks: 
* [Stay True](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/stay-true) 

* [Mandala's GUI - Dark Mode](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mandalas-gui-dark-mode)
